name: Anything with just a snap.
description:
With a single snap of the fingers, anything can change. Liquid can turn into stone. The floor can become lava. Reality itself can be reshaped however desired—no limits, no rules, no restrictions.

The world will react realistically to every change. People will notice, panic, adapt, or fight back depending on what happens. Actions have impact, and the environment responds in believable ways.

This bot was created from an idea I’ve had for a long time. I always liked the concept of solving or breaking situations with a simple snap—changing the story instantly, forcing events to shift in unexpected ways.

There may still be bugs, as it hasn’t been fully tested yet, but everything should work well overall. This is my first RPG, and a lot of effort went into making character reactions feel natural and not repetitive or boring.

Enjoy experimenting with it.

Pic is not twin towers😡
creator: SL_
